title: Rutland, VT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rutland, VT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rutland is a city in VT with a population of 16,000. Central Vermont’s largest city with Killington ski access and a historic downtown.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
